name: Fourth of July Parfait
recipeIngredient: 1 8 oz. cream cheese, at room temperature
1 teaspoon fresh lemon juice to taste
1 pint blueberries lightly sprinkled with sugar
1 pint red raspberries lightly sprinkled with sugar
fresh mint leaves or lemon balm for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the cream cheese and powdered sugar. Whip with an electric mixer until fluffy.
2. Slowly add whipping cream a little at a time. Continue beating until the cream is incorporated and the mixture is fluffy.
3. Add lemon juice to taste.
4. To assemble parfaits, use parfait glasses, tall wine glasses or champagne flutes.
5. Spoon 1 inch of blueberries into the glass.
6. Top with a dollop of cream.
7. Spoon 1 inch of raspberries on top.
8. Add another dollop of cream.
9. Spoon another layer of blueberries.
10. Add another dollop of cream.
11. Top the parfait with a spoonful of red raspberries.
12. Garnish with mint leaves or lemon balm.
NOTE: You could use strawberries for the red raspberries.
